summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of STAAR Diagnostic Flow. All 10 backend API tests passed. All 10 frontend features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ /student/home shows welcome text 'Ready for the Math STAAR?' with two buttons
✅ 'Start 5-Minute Diagnostic' button (data-testid=start-diagnostic-btn) visible and navigates to /student/diagnostic
✅ 'Skip to Map' button (data-testid=skip-to-map-btn) visible and navigates to /student/map
✅ /student/diagnostic loads 5 questions with progress bar showing 'Question 1 of 5'
✅ Diagnostic shows question text (data-testid=diagnostic-question), answer input (data-testid=diagnostic-answer-input), submit button (data-testid=diagnostic-submit-btn)
✅ Submitting an answer advances to next question, progress bar updates correctly
✅ Student nav bar shows Home, Diagnostic, Map links (data-testid=nav-home, nav-diagnostic, nav-map)
✅ API GET /api/tutor/problem/{node_id} returns valid problems for all diagnostic nodes (N01, N04, N05, N15, N17)
✅ Diagnostic results banner appears on map showing 'DIAGNOSTIC COMPLETE - X/5 correct — Red islands are your gaps'
✅ Map highlights incorrect nodes as diagnostic-gap (red pulsing) with 'Start Here!' labels

test_classes: TestDiagnosticProblemAPI: 7/7 passed (5 diagnostic nodes + 2 metadata tests)

critical_code_review_comments: DiagnosticFlow.jsx correctly fetches problems from all 5 diagnostic nodes (N01, N04, N05, N15, N17)
Answer matching is case-insensitive string comparison as documented
Navigation to map with diagnosticResults state works correctly
StudentMap.jsx correctly reads location.state.diagnosticResults and displays banner + colors gap nodes red
CSS animation 'gap-pulse' creates the red pulsing effect for diagnostic-gap nodes
test_credentials: No credentials needed - demo mode. Login as Student by clicking 'Log in as Student' then selecting first student card.
seed_data_creation: Uses pre-seeded demo students: student-001 (Alex Champion)
context_for_next_testing_agent: STAAR Diagnostic Flow fully tested and working. The flow is: /login -> click 'Log in as Student' -> student picker -> select student -> /student/home -> click 'Start 5-Minute Diagnostic' -> /student/diagnostic (5 questions from N01,N04,N05,N15,N17) -> auto-navigate to /student/map with diagnostic results. Map shows banner and red pulsing nodes for gaps. All data-testid attributes are in place for automated testing.
